filename: Application to review an AUSTRAC decision.docx
text:
Part A - Decision to be reviewed
Please select the decision that you are seeking to be reviewed:

Part B - Applicant information

Your representative's details (if you have one):

Part C - AUSTRAC decision to be reviewed
In as much detail as possible, setting out the reasons why the decision should be reviewed:

Supporting documents
Please list in the box below any additional documentation you are providing with this form in support of your application.

Part D - Declaration

Provide details of the person completing this form:

I declare that:
I am authorised to complete this application on behalf of the applicant.
The information I have given in this form is true, accurate and complete.
I understand criminal or civil penalties may apply for giving false or misleading information or for failing to supply information.

Privacy statement
Personal information is protected by law, including the Privacy Act 1988 (Privacy Act). AUSTRAC is authorised to collect the information in this form under the AML/CTF Act and under the AML/CTF Rules made for the purposes of the Reporting Entities Roll and the Remittance Sector Register. The information collected in this form will be used for the purpose of the review of a decision made by AUSTRAC, and for other lawful purposes under the AML/CTF Act and the Privacy Act. Information reported to AUSTRAC is made available to other government agencies including law enforcement agencies pursuant to the provisions of the AML/CTF Act.
